name: context-autopilot
description: Mines your Claude Code and Cursor sessions into evidence-based CLAUDE.md / AGENTS.md rules you approve.
long_description: Automated context collection for coding agents. Context Autopilot mines your real agent session history for repeated instructions, corrections, and rejected actions, then distills them into CLAUDE.md / AGENTS.md rules — with your own past messages as evidence. Includes global mode (cross-project rules about how you work), staleness detection, and in-chat approval. 100% local, zero dependencies, no API key required.

tools.name: list_observable_projects
tools.description: List projects with observable agent-session history

tools.name: scan_context_signals
tools.description: Mine session history for repeated instructions, corrections, and rejections

tools.name: distill_context_proposals
tools.description: Distill signals into evidence-backed CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md proposals

tools.name: distill_global_context
tools.description: Distill cross-project rules about how you work into ~/.claude/CLAUDE.md proposals

tools.name: apply_context_proposals
tools.description: Apply the user's accept/reject decisions to pending proposals

tools.name: find_stale_context
tools.description: Find context-file references the repo has outgrown
